all.en: For more than ten years, I drank at least three cups of sugary coffee every day.
all.zh: 超過十年來，我每天至少要喝三杯加糖的咖啡。

all.en: My doctor warned me that the extra sugar was raising my risk of diabetes.
all.zh: 醫生警告我，過多的糖份正在提高我罹患糖尿病的風險。

all.en: That conversation shocked me enough to start planning a serious change.
all.zh: 那次對話讓我相當震驚，足以讓我開始認真規劃改變。

all.en: I decided not to quit cold turkey, because that approach had failed me before.
all.zh: 我決定不要一下子完全戒掉，因為以前那樣做都失敗過。

all.en: Instead, I reduced the amount of sugar in each cup little by little every week.
all.zh: 我改成每週一點一點地減少每杯咖啡的糖量。

all.en: During the first two weeks, the coffee tasted bitter and almost unpleasant.
all.zh: 前兩週，咖啡喝起來又苦又難以入口。

all.en: To handle my cravings, I kept a glass of cold water on my desk all day long.
all.zh: 為了應付嘴饞，我整天在桌上都放著一杯冰水。

all.en: I also told my coworkers about my goal, so they could remind me when I felt weak.
all.zh: 我也告訴同事我的目標，這樣在我意志不堅時他們可以提醒我。

all.en: By the end of the second month, I was drinking my coffee completely black.
all.zh: 到了第二個月底，我已經能完全喝黑咖啡了。

all.en: My energy felt steadier throughout the day, without the usual afternoon crashes.
all.zh: 我一整天精神都比較穩定，不再像以前下午突然沒力。

all.en: At my next checkup, my blood sugar level had dropped back into the normal range.
all.zh: 下一次健檢時，我的血糖值已經回到正常範圍。

all.en: Breaking that single habit gave me the confidence to improve other parts of my life.
all.zh: 戒掉這一個習慣讓我有信心去改善生活中的其他面向。

all.en: My wallet also felt heavier, since I was no longer buying three coffees a day.
all.zh: 我的錢包也變得更厚實，因為我不再每天買三杯咖啡。

all.en: Friends began asking how I had managed to stay so disciplined for so long.
all.zh: 朋友開始問我，怎麼有辦法這麼久都這麼自律。

all.en: I explained that gradual changes felt far easier than dramatic ones.
all.zh: 我解釋說，漸進式的改變比劇烈的改變容易得多。

all.en: To replace the comfort of sweet drinks, I started brewing herbal tea in the afternoon.
all.zh: 為了取代甜飲帶來的慰藉，我下午開始泡花草茶。

all.en: On weekends, I tried baking my own snacks with very little sugar inside.
all.zh: 週末時，我會試著烘烤含糖量極少的點心。

all.en: My sleep also improved noticeably after I cut out the late-night caffeine entirely.
all.zh: 在我完全戒掉深夜咖啡因後，睡眠也明顯改善了。

all.en: My wife joined me on the journey and reduced her own sugar intake too.
all.zh: 我太太也加入了這趟旅程，跟著減少自己的糖份攝取。

all.en: Together, we threw out every hidden box of cookies and candy in the kitchen.
all.zh: 我們一起把廚房裡每一盒藏起來的餅乾和糖果都丟掉。

all.en: Six months later, I had lost almost six kilograms without any strict diet.
all.zh: 六個月後，我在沒有嚴格節食的情況下，瘦了將近六公斤。

all.en: Looking back, I am proud that one small daily decision changed my whole life.
all.zh: 回頭看，我很驕傲一個微小的日常決定，改變了我的整個人生。

all.en: My energy levels climbed steadily, and I started waking up before the morning alarm rang.
all.zh: 我的精力穩定提升，開始在早上鬧鐘響起之前就自然醒來。

all.en: My doctor was genuinely surprised at my improved blood sugar and cholesterol numbers.
all.zh: 我的醫生對我血糖和膽固醇數值的改善感到由衷驚訝。

all.en: I replaced my old sweet snacks with fresh fruit and small handfuls of mixed nuts.
all.zh: 我用新鮮水果和一小把綜合堅果，取代了過去的甜食點心。

all.en: Friends began asking me what secret method I had used to transform my appearance.
all.zh: 朋友們開始問我，到底用了什麼祕密方法改變了自己的外表。

all.en: I told them honestly that there was no shortcut, only patience and daily honesty.
all.zh: 我老實告訴他們，沒有捷徑，只有耐心和每天對自己誠實。

all.en: On my birthday, I allowed myself one slice of cake without feeling any guilt.
all.zh: 生日那天，我允許自己吃一片蛋糕，沒有任何罪惡感。

all.en: Moderation, I realized, was far more powerful than any strict rule or quick fix.
all.zh: 我體會到，節制遠比任何嚴格規則或速成方法都更有力量。

all.en: I joined a community walking group and made several new friends along the way.
all.zh: 我加入了一個社區健走團，途中也認識了好幾位新朋友。

all.en: My wife and I began planning a hiking trip we once thought impossible to complete.
all.zh: 我和太太開始規劃一趟我們曾經以為不可能完成的健行旅程。

all.en: Quitting one bad habit had quietly opened many beautiful doors in my everyday life.
all.zh: 戒掉一個壞習慣，悄悄地為我日常生活打開了許多扇美麗的門。
